message:
test(proptest): expand recorder suite with serde roundtrip and sequence monotonicity

Add 171 lines of new property-based tests to proptest_recorder.rs:

RecorderEvent serde roundtrip (100 cases):
- Construct a RecorderEvent via make_event_for_prop() with arbitrary
  pane_id, sequence, timestamp, source, and payload variants
- Serialize to JSON and deserialize back, asserting event_id, pane_id,
  sequence, occurred_at_ms, recorded_at_ms, and schema_version are
  preserved exactly through the roundtrip

SequenceAssigner global monotonicity (200 cases):
- Feed a random schedule of 2-100 pane_id assignments to a fresh
  SequenceAssigner and assert that the global_seq value is strictly
  increasing across all calls regardless of pane interleaving

SequenceAssigner per-pane monotonicity (200 cases):
- Same random pane schedule, but track per-pane last-seen sequence and
  assert each pane's sequence is strictly increasing independently,
  even when interleaved with other panes

These tests strengthen confidence in the recorder's event ordering
guarantees which are critical for correct replay and search indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
